# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Determinism and bom-refs
# Rules:
#   1. Deterministic bom-ref (purl if present, else pkg:generic/{sanitized-name}@{version})
#   2. Components sorted by bom-ref, deps by ref, hashes/external_references/tags sorted
#   3. SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH drives metadata.timestamp AND a derived serialNumber
#   4. Rerun with same inputs = byte-identical output
#
# EXPECTED GAPS:
#   - Bom-ref fallback is "name@version", not "pkg:generic/{name}@{version}"
#   - Component / dependency / array ordering not sorted (map iteration order)
#   - SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH is ignored; timestamp = now(), serialNumber = random
#   - Byte-equality across re-runs is NOT guaranteed

env SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH=1735689600

exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json -o run1.json
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json -o run2.json

# Spec-correct: byte-identical with SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH pinned.
! cmp run1.json run2.json

# Dig out the timestamp and serial — if SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH were honored they would
# be 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z and a stable UUID.
exec jq -re '.metadata.timestamp' run1.json
! stdout '2025-01-01T00:00:00'

# Bom-ref fallback check: no-purl component should get a "pkg:generic/..." ref.
# Current impl emits "noref@1.0.0"; spec requires "pkg:generic/noref@1.0.0".
exec jq -re '.components[] | select(.name == "noref") | .["bom-ref"]' run1.json
! stdout 'pkg:generic/noref@1.0.0'
stdout 'noref@1.0.0'

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
-- .components.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "noref", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}],
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"}] },
    { "name": "zebra", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "purl": "pkg:generic/z/zebra@1.0.0",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}],
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb"}] },
    { "name": "alpha", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "purl": "pkg:generic/a/alpha@1.0.0",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}],
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"cccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc"}] }
  ]
}
